ogTitle: Sylvania vs Tabbil Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sylvania and Tabbil Creek.
heading: Sylvania vs Tabbil Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sylvania, New South Wales and Tabbil Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sylvania has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Tabbil Creek (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sylvania or Tabbil Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sylvania has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Tabbil Creek scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sylvania scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Tabbil Creek scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sylvania or Tabbil Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sylvania has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.57% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
